title: BRAVESHINE Glitter Gold Foil Fringe Curtain Backdrop Metallic Tinsel Curtains for Birthday Umrah Mubarak New Years Eve Decorations 2026 Chrsitmas Disco Engegement Party Decorations - 2Pcs 1x2.5m
features: Package contents: Metallic tinsel foil fringes curtains are made by aluminium foil with laser spangle. 2 Packs/SET, enough quantity for your party decoration. Each pack curtains size is 1m x 2.5m, enough length to decorate your party. And the durable material allows you to use the backdrop repeatedly.

NEW STYLE: The latest laser sparkle foil curtains are laser models, more brighter color than other metallic foil, more celebratory atmosphere. Bring to life an elegant glitter and gold themed prom or party. Transform a stage, ballroom, school dance or reception to a golden shining night.

Perfect Photo Backdrop: Perfect as a gold party backdrop for birthday, umrah mubarak decorations, New Year Eve, Christmas, graduations, engagement party decorations, weeding decorations, Halloween, mardi gras, Ramadan Mubarak, sweet 16, movie night, eurovision themed party, hawaiian themed party, retirement party, wedding, baby showers and more. Great for ceilings, windows and wall curtain decorations. After cutting, it is also suitable for table decoration. use your creativity to leave fabulous party photos for you.

Easy installation: The party backdrop is already prepared with adhesive strip, this adhesive tape is designed for wall application so that it could hold up longer time and safer on your wall. Just remove the paper backing and stick it to the wall and you have a glitter backdrop for your photo booth props.

Enjoy BRAVESHINE glitter curtains: BRAVESHINE foil curtains are made of good quality. If for any reason you are not happy with our tinsel curtains, we will solve your problem in time. Enjoy BRAVESHINE glitter curtain!
